ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight #1234
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Your flight details are as follows:

- Flight Number: SH1234
- Departure: New York (JFK) – 08:45 AM, 15 Oct 2026
- Arrival: London Heathrow (LHR) – 06:15 PM, 15 Oct 2026
- Seat: 12A
- Baggage: 1 checked bag (23kg) + 1 carry‑on

Please review the itinerary attached and let us know if you have any changes. For any assistance, reply to this email or call our customer support at 1‑800‑SKYHIGH.

Safe travels!

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airlines Team

© 2026 SkyHigh Airlines. All rights reserved.
